scope: synthetic-data, Stripe-test-mode canary; no real buyer charge or supplier payout

schedule.supplier_settlement_policy: floor whole cents and carry sub-cent liability

stop_conditions: Any real-mode Stripe object or real cash movement is observed.
A non-allowlisted buyer, supplier, worker, model, jurisdiction or workload enters the canary.
Input is not demonstrably synthetic or may contain personal, confidential, regulated, production or credential data.
Catalog price, source or formula changes after restart without an approved schedule change.
Cash, per-job allocation, invoice, ledger or supplier liability fails exact conservation.
An active buyer/provider dispute or abuse hold does not freeze the related payout.
Daily test budget, task cap, liability cap or loss cap is absent or exceeded.
Model artifact hash, revision, license receipt or runtime authority differs from the approved manifest.
Provider state is unknown and cannot be reconciled idempotently.
The dispatch, billing or payout kill switch cannot be exercised immediately.

open_blockers.blocker: Catalog price mutability across restart is unresolved.
open_blockers.exit_criterion: One versioned authority and repeated-start parity test pass on the candidate.

open_blockers.blocker: Referenced benchmark receipts are absent from the committed candidate.
open_blockers.exit_criterion: Commit checksum-bound hardware/runtime/model benchmark receipts and reproduce them.

open_blockers.blocker: The cost model omits material cost and risk categories.
open_blockers.exit_criterion: Approve a complete sensitivity model and zero/low/base/high cases.

open_blockers.blocker: The complete Stripe test-mode collection/refund/dispute/payout matrix has not run.
open_blockers.exit_criterion: Attach provider-owned test IDs, events, fees and exact reconciliation receipts.

open_blockers.blocker: Per-job cent allocation and dispute-to-payout freezing are not proven.
open_blockers.exit_criterion: Pass adversarial rounding and concurrent dispute/payout conservation tests.

open_blockers.blocker: Agent earnings display is not bound to server price or realistic paid utilization.
open_blockers.exit_criterion: Use the signed schedule, label assumptions and prove zero-demand plus measured-utilization scenarios.

open_blockers.blocker: Tax, supplier classification, charge/refund and payout terms are unapproved.
open_blockers.exit_criterion: Counsel approves exact jurisdictions and disclosures before live money.

open_blockers.blocker: No bounded canary cohort, caps, kill-switch owner or final candidate binding is recorded.
open_blockers.exit_criterion: Populate allowlists/caps/owners, bind exact commit and pass a representative Stripe-test canary.

open_blockers.blocker: No live-money evidence exists for utilization, fees, losses or contribution margin.
open_blockers.exit_criterion: After every code/legal/test-mode gate passes, run a separately approved bounded live-money canary and attach receipts.
